login_hero_body: Your workspace. Your data. Runs on European servers, never shared, always verifiably private.
login_hero_bullet_eu: Your data never leaves the EU
forgot_hero_body: Lost access? No problem. We'll send you a link. You pick a new password and you're back in.
forgot_subheading: Enter your email address and we will send you a reset link.
forgot_done_body: If this email address is known to us, you will receive a link to reset your password.
set_hero_body: After that, you have access to your private AI environment.
set_subheading: Choose a password of at least 8 characters.
set_error_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
set_error_invalid_link: Link has expired or is invalid, request a new reset link
set_error_server: Failed to set password, please try again later
set_invalid_link: This link is invalid or has expired.
signup_hero_body: Create an account and get started immediately. No fine print. Just done right.
signup_confirm_body: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click the link to activate your account.
signup_confirm_hint: After verification you will be redirected automatically to your workspace.
signup_privacy_text: By signing up you agree to our
totp_subheading: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
setup_2fa_hero_highlight: A lot more peace of mind.
setup_2fa_hero_body: Two-step verification means only you can access your workspace. Even if your password is ever compromised.
setup_2fa_subheading: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app and enter the code to confirm.
setup_2fa_done_body: Your account is secured. You are being redirected to Klai.
app_home_subtitle: Your workspace runs on European servers. Everything stays yours.
app_tool_chat_description: Private AI conversations on European servers
app_tool_transcribe_description: Convert audio, video and meetings to text
app_scribe_subtitle: Generate documents and notes with AI.
app_scribe_card_description: Document editor will be built here — Phase 2.
app_transcribe_subtitle: Convert audio and video to text.
app_transcribe_card_description: Upload interface will be built here — Phase 2.
app_transcribe_upload_description: Drag an audio file or click to upload.
app_transcribe_dropzone_label: Drag a file here or click to browse
app_transcribe_processing_hint: This may take 30-60 seconds per minute of audio on CPU.
app_transcribe_record_permission_request: Microphone access is required to record.
app_transcribe_record_permission_denied: Microphone access denied. Enable it in your browser settings.
app_transcribe_record_error_mic: Cannot open microphone. Check your permissions.
app_transcribe_empty_body: Upload an audio file and convert it to text.
admin_home_subtitle: Users, subscription, and settings of your organisation.
admin_users_subtitle: Manage the users in your organisation.
admin_users_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to remove {name}?
admin_billing_setup_plan_description: Prices per user per month, excl. VAT.
admin_billing_details_description: Required for a legally valid Dutch invoice (VAT Act 1968, art. 35).
admin_billing_field_billing_email_hint: If invoices should go to a different address than your login address.
admin_billing_sepa_note: You will be redirected to Moneybird for the SEPA direct debit authorisation.
admin_billing_free_description: This account has free access to the full Klai platform.
admin_billing_mandate_description: We have received your details and will contact you to set up payment. You will receive a confirmation once your subscription is active.
admin_billing_invoices_description: View and download invoices via the Moneybird portal.
admin_billing_payment_failed_description: The SEPA direct debit was rejected. Check if your bank account has sufficient funds and try again.
admin_billing_cancelled_description: Your subscription has ended. You can reactivate it at any time.
admin_settings_org_description: Name, domain, and subscription details — to be built in Phase 3.
admin_settings_language_description: The language used for invitation and verification emails sent to new users.
account_subtitle: Personal settings for your Klai account.
account_language_description: The language of the portal and emails you receive.
provisioning_polling_subtitle: We are starting your personal environment. This usually takes less than a minute.
provisioning_ready_subtitle: You are being redirected to your workspace…
provisioning_failed_body: Setting up your workspace failed. Please contact us at
logged_out_hero_body: Klai is ready for your next session.
logged_out_body: Your session has been safely closed.
verify_hero_body: Confirm your email address. After that, you have access to your private AI environment.
verify_success_body: Your account is active. You can now log in.
verify_error_invalid_link: This link is invalid or has expired.
verify_error_connection: A connection error occurred. Please try again later.
verify_error_hint: Sign up again to receive a new verification email, or contact us at
setup_mfa_hero_body: Choose how to secure your account. Only you will have access, even if your password is ever compromised.
setup_mfa_subheading: Choose a method for two-factor authentication.
setup_mfa_passkey_description: Sign in with your fingerprint, face, or device PIN. No codes, always secure.
setup_mfa_email_description: We send you a code when you sign in. Simple, no app required.
setup_mfa_totp_description: Use Google Authenticator, 1Password, or Authy for time-based codes.
setup_mfa_passkey_body: Click the button below and follow your device's instructions. Your browser will ask for your fingerprint, face, or PIN.
setup_mfa_passkey_error_unsupported: Your browser does not support passkeys. Please choose a different method.
setup_mfa_passkey_error_failed: Setup failed. Please try again or choose a different method.
setup_mfa_email_body: We will send a test code to {email} to confirm it works.
setup_mfa_email_error_invalid: Incorrect or expired code, please try again.
setup_mfa_done_body: Well done. Your account is now better protected.
admin_settings_security_description: Configure how strictly two-factor authentication (2FA) is enforced for your organisation.
admin_settings_mfa_optional_hint: Users can set up 2FA, but it is not required.
admin_settings_mfa_recommended_hint: Users are asked to set up 2FA but can skip it.
admin_settings_mfa_required_hint: Users must set up 2FA before they can use the app.
app_tool_focus_description: Search documents and ask questions from your own sources
docs_pages_empty: No pages yet. Upload a .md file or create a new page.
docs_kb_empty_body: Create your first knowledge base and start writing.
docs_kb_delete_modal_body: This will delete all pages and cannot be undone. Type {name} to confirm.
docs_editor_select_page: Select a page from the sidebar.
app_focus_subtitle: Ask questions from your own documents.
app_focus_empty: No notebooks yet. Create a notebook to get started.
app_focus_no_sources: No sources yet. Add a document or URL.
app_focus_source_file_hint: Drop a file or click to upload (PDF, DOCX, TXT)
app_focus_chat_mode_narrow_tooltip: Answers only using your uploaded sources
app_focus_chat_mode_broad_tooltip: Uses your sources and supplements with general knowledge
app_focus_chat_mode_web_tooltip: Also searches the web live and combines with your sources
app_focus_chat_error: An error occurred, please try again.
app_focus_onboarding_body: Add documents, URLs or YouTube videos as sources and ask questions about your own material.
app_focus_onboarding_history_body: Enable history to save conversations so you can continue where you left off. Disabling it does not clear the current session. Use the reset icon (↺) to clear the current session and start fresh.
app_focus_empty_body: Create a notebook to start asking questions from your documents.
help_intro_desc: Hover over elements on this page to see what they do. Click the question mark to turn help off again.
help_home_greeting_desc: Your home base. Everything you need is one click away.
help_home_chat_desc: Your AI assistant. Ask questions, draft texts, get summaries — running entirely on your own infrastructure.
help_home_transcribe_desc: Upload audio, record live, or add a meeting. Klai turns it into text, fast.
help_home_focus_desc: Create notebooks with your own sources. The AI stays focused on exactly what you put in.
help_home_docs_desc: Build a knowledge base your AI assistant can search through — great for policies, manuals, or FAQs.
help_chat_page_desc: Your AI assistant runs entirely on your own server. Not a single conversation leaves your organisation.
help_transcribe_add_desc: Add a new transcription. Upload an audio file, record directly with your microphone, or add a meeting.
help_transcribe_list_desc: All your transcriptions. Click an item to view the text, rename it, or delete it.
help_transcribe_copy_desc: Copy the full text to your clipboard.
help_transcribe_download_desc: Download the transcription as a text file.
help_focus_add_desc: Create a new notebook. Then add sources so the AI can give focused, relevant answers.
help_focus_list_desc: Your notebooks. Each one has its own sources, keeping the AI focused on exactly your topic.
help_docs_create_desc: Create a new knowledge base. Then add pages your AI assistant can search through.
help_docs_list_desc: All your knowledge bases. Click one to view, edit, or add pages.
help_account_profile_desc: Your personal settings. Update your name and language preference here.
help_account_2fa_desc: Two-factor authentication. Enable this for an extra layer of security on your account.
help_admin_users_invite_desc: Invite a new user. They'll receive an email with an activation link.
help_admin_users_table_desc: All users in your organisation. Manage roles or deactivate accounts here.
help_admin_settings_general_desc: Organisation-wide settings. Changes here apply to all users.
help_admin_billing_overview_desc: Your billing overview. See your current plan and usage here.
help_home_intro_desc: This is your home. All tools available to your account are shown here. Hover over a tool to see what it does.
help_chat_intro_desc: Chat is your AI assistant. Ask questions, draft text, or get summaries — running entirely on your own European servers. Hover over elements for more information.
help_transcribe_intro_desc: Scribe converts audio, video and meetings to text. Upload a file, record live, or add a meeting. Hover over elements to see what they do.
help_focus_intro_desc: Focus lets you ask questions about your own documents. Create a notebook, add sources, and chat with the AI on topic. Hover over elements for more information.
help_docs_intro_desc: Docs is for managing knowledge bases. Create knowledge bases, add pages, and use them as sources for your AI assistant. Hover over elements for more information.
help_account_intro_desc: Manage your personal settings here: name, language preference, and two-factor authentication. Hover over elements to see what they do.
help_admin_users_intro_desc: All users in your organisation are shown here. You can invite users, change roles, and manage accounts. Hover over elements for more information.
help_admin_settings_intro_desc: Organisation-wide settings. Changes here apply to all users in your organisation. Hover over elements to see what they do.
help_admin_billing_intro_desc: Your billing overview. See your current plan, usage, and billing history. Hover over elements for more information.
app_tool_knowledge_description: Your personal and organisation knowledge base
help_home_knowledge_desc: Everything Klai knows about you and your organisation — saved automatically during conversations or added manually.
knowledge_personal_empty_body: The AI automatically saves what you ask it to store. You can also create pages yourself.
knowledge_sources_drag_hint: Drop a file here or click to select
knowledge_sources_file_type_error: File type not supported. Use .pdf, .docx, .txt or .md
knowledge_page_intro_body: Everything Klai knows about you and your organisation is stored here. That knowledge is used automatically in every conversation.
knowledge_page_personal_body: Type 'Remember this' or 'Save this for me' — instantly searchable in your next conversations.
knowledge_page_org_body: Type 'Save this for the org' — instantly available to all colleagues.
knowledge_page_chat_body: During a conversation, click the bookmark icon or type "Remember that..." to save something directly to your knowledge base. Klai will use it from that moment on.
knowledge_page_docs_body: Type 'Create an article from this' — it appears in the knowledge base.
app_meetings_empty_body: Start a bot to record a meeting.
app_meetings_consent_label: I understand that a bot will join the meeting, other participants will see it, and audio is processed on Klai EU servers.
app_meetings_teams_warning: Warning: Microsoft may block Teams bots. If this happens, the recording will fail.
app_meetings_url_error: Not a valid meeting URL (Google Meet, Zoom or Teams)
app_meetings_limit_error: Maximum 2 active meetings at a time. Stop an existing bot to continue.
app_meetings_active_info: We're on our way to your meeting. If you see a prompt, go ahead and admit the bot. Once the meeting wraps up, we wait 60 seconds, in case anyone comes back. Then we close out automatically and the transcript shows up in the overview. Feel free to close this window.
